overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character exploring a neon-lit downtown district at night. The clip alternates between looking up at towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and walking through busy street-level intersections with pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon between cyberpunk skyscrapers with elevated transit infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the tower with illuminated 10 sign

agents.ego_description: standing still while looking up at the towering building with red neon accents and elevated train tracks

entered.detail: tall teal and rust-colored skyscraper with large illuminated 10 signage near the top
rusted metal elevated railway structure running between buildings
building facade with bright red neon lighting and cylindrical glass elevator shaft
tall modern buildings with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of a towering cyberpunk skyscraper marked with a large illuminated 10. The camera pans around the vertical canyon, showing elevated train tracks and buildings wrapped in vibrant red neon lighting. No pedestrians are visible in this vertical exploration of the architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and ground level shops

events.description: camera drops from vertical building view to street level at a busy intersection
yellow sports car drives through the intersection as pedestrians cross

agents.ego_description: walking across the marked crosswalk with other pedestrians, navigating through the active intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving through the intersection
pedestrian in white shirt and dark pants crossing the street

entered.detail: yellow striped crosswalk with illuminated WALK text on the ground
shops with neon signage at street level including a bar with green neon
traffic lights showing red for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically to street level at a busy intersection. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while a yellow sports car drives through. Ground-level shops with neon signage line the street, and the towering structures from the previous segment are now out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with elevated highway and massive digital billboards

events.description: camera looks up from street level to focus on building facades and elevated highway infrastructure
camera pans across the elevated highway structure showing multiple levels of infrastructure

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering architecture, elevated highways, and large digital billboards overhead

entered.detail: massive colorful digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
multi-level concrete highway structure with metal railings spanning between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward again to examine the dense urban infrastructure, focusing on a massive digital billboard and elevated concrete highways that crisscross between buildings. The scene emphasizes the layered vertical architecture of the cyberpunk city, with metal beams and concrete structures dominating the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with street vendors and parked vintage vehicles

events.description: camera returns to following the character at street level along the sidewalk
character walks past a parked vintage red car with white roof

agents.ego_description: following the character with pink hair down the sidewalk, passing street vendors and parked cars while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character with pink hair and red outfit walking down the sidewalk
street vendor standing behind food cart with large umbrella

entered.detail: street sign with white text on dark background mounted on pole
classic red vehicle with white roof parked along the curb
food stall with large green and red umbrella, tables and chairs on sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a character with pink hair along a busy sidewalk lined with parked vintage cars and street vendors. The camera passes an Ellison street sign and navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic. A street vendor with a colorful umbrella operates a food cart on the right, while the urban canyon continues with neon-lit storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dizzying vertical exploration of neon skyscrapers down into the bustling, crowded life of a cyberpunk street. It begins with a dramatic upward pan of a towering skyscraper marked with an illuminated 10, sweeping across elevated train tracks and buildings bathed in vibrant red light. The perspective then shifts abruptly to street level, crossing a yellow-striped intersection alongside pedestrians and a passing yellow sports car amidst a glow of neon shop signs. As the camera tilts upward once more to examine the layered urban infrastructure of digital billboards and crisscrossing concrete highways, the view eventually descends to follow a pink-haired character along a busy sidewalk. The movement finally glides past vintage cars and an Ellison street sign, navigating through pedestrian traffic toward a colorful food cart and neon-lit storefronts.
